auth_config_env: multitenancy_enabled (NOT authentication — routing label only via X-Scope-OrgID)
misconfig_patterns: Single-binary docker -p 3200:3200 left running as production
Ingress without auth annotation (chart ships ingress.enabled:false but operators flip it)
/status/config dumps S3 SSE-C key plaintext pre-2.10.3 (CVE-2026-28377)

active_probe.false_positive_check: body_exact 'echo' (4 bytes); Content-Type text/plain; header_absent Server. Confirm with /api/search/tags returning {tagNames:[...]}

deployment_tells: Helm tempo-distributed pre-1.41 uses 3100; post-1.41 uses 3200
pivot_paths: /api/search/tags → schema disclosure (attr keys: user.email, llm.prompt, db.statement)
/api/traces/{id} → full span tree with gen_ai.prompt/completion when LLM-instrumented
/status/config → S3/GCS bucket names + (pre-2.10.3) SSE-C key plaintext
/status/overrides → tenant ID enumeration when multitenancy on
Shadow ports 3000/3100/9009 → Grafana+Loki+Mimir LGTM stack adjacency
vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-28377 (CVSS 7.5, PR:N) — S3 SSE-C key exposed plaintext via /status/config (pre-2.10.3)
GHSA-fx6q-qhch-hxgp — Transitive Alpine apk-tools in tempo-memcached image
sources: CANDIDATE — grafana.com/docs/tempo/latest/operations/authentication/ ("does not come with any included authentication layer")
